name: seatlock
description: SeatLock — Event Ticketing with Concurrency-Safe Seat Booking

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run docker:up && echo 'Waiting for Postgres to be ready...' && sleep 5 && npm run migrate && npm run seed
